summary: anySwapOutUnderlyingWithPermit accepted EIP-2612 permit signatures without validating that the signed token was the call target, letting attackers redeem tokens with valid permits for unrelated contracts.
attack_trace: Acquire valid EIP-2612 permit for low-value token
Reuse permit signature against unrelated token via anySwapOut
Drain user balances that previously approved the bridge
root_cause: permit() in the bridge router did not bind the signed permit to the actual swap target token.
